alt_text: Two outstretched hands shown palm-up; right-hand fingers numbered 1-4 in green tracing from pinky to index, then arrows continue to the left hand fingers numbered 5 (thumb) and 6 (palm/joint), then up to 7 marked in red on a left-hand finger. A finger-counting (tasbih) sequence diagram.
notes: Pedagogical diagram for a 7-step finger-counting/tasbih ordering across the two hands.
